title: Guzse's Additional Cobblemon
description: This pack adds some more Cobblemon to your world.
body:
We wanted some more variation in the kinds of Pokémon we'd come across, so I made a few myself! Currently, the data pack adds the following Pokémon:

- Starly *(Spawns where Pidgey spawns)*
- Staravia *(Spawns where Pidgeotto spawns)*
- Staraptor *(Spawns where Pidgeot spawns)*
- Duskull *(Uncommon, forests at night)*
- Dusclops *(Uncommon, forests at night)*
- Dusknoir

Add it to both your resource- and data packs. The pack can also be added to servers.
